content: Anwesha is the kind of person who makes you believe in love at first commit. She once fixed a production bug while simultaneously planning a surprise party. Her code is clean, her heart is pure, and her birthday parties are legendary.
name: Cupid DevOps

content: Working with Anwesha is like pair programming with sunshine. She brings warmth to every code review, joy to every standup, and cake to every retrospective. 10/10 would collaborate again.
name: Heartful Reviewer

content: I have been secretly admiring Anwesha's code from afar. Her variable names are poetry, her functions are art, and her README files should be published as bestselling novels. Happy Birthday!
name: Secret Admirer

content: Anwesha's approach to problem-solving is unique — she treats every bug like a romantic subplot that needs a happy ending. Her merge conflicts always resolve peacefully, and her deployments come with confetti.
name: Romantic Algorithm
